title: Dev Pod images (GPU + CPU) + dev runtime channel, gated on dev_mode
description: 1.1.0 is RELEASED and every released app pins the same Pod image tag and the same R2 'stable' runtime channel, so any Pod-image or wrapper.py edit ships straight to real users. Add a dev-only image tag pair plus a dev R2 runtime channel, both selected by the EXISTING server-side _devMode (routes/remotePodLifecycle.js:37, BUILD_HASH === 'dev'), so RunPod work (MPI-333, MPI-329, MPI-341) can iterate with zero blast radius on released builds. No new Dockerfile and no CI workflow change needed. Full design in brief.md. SCOPE ALSO INCLUDES docs/rules/skills: the Context Router row in CLAUDE.md plus 6 other live files currently teach 'publish-runtime.sh stable' as the only runtime-ship path, and mpi-release gains a Preconditions check for un-promoted dev runtime drift. Blast radius grep-verified in brief.md.
